landsat_7_etm_plus.warning: SLC-Off Error: Data after May 2003 has diagonal black stripes. Your 'cesarops-slicer' dedup/mmap must skip 0-value pixels.

terra_aqua_modis.hint: Resolution is coarse (250m-1km), but revisit is daily. Use this to find the 'start date' of a leak before using Landsat for the 'pin'.

eo1_ali.hint: Advanced Land Imager (ALI) was the prototype for Landsat 8. Cleaner signal-to-noise than Landsat 7.

envisat_meris.hint: The predecessor to Sentinel-3. Great for 'retracting' 2012 silt loads.

spot_4_5.hint: Commercial, but often released in open archives for 'low water' research.
